name: Afghani
summary: A foundational landrace indica named for its region of origin, prized for heavy resin and a sweet, earthy hash aroma.

name: Hindu Kush
summary: A landrace indica from the Hindu Kush range with a sweet, earthy sandalwood aroma and a thick coat of trichomes.

name: Thai
summary: A landrace sativa from Thailand, a parent of many classic crosses, with bright citrus and earthy notes.

name: Durban Poison
summary: A pure South African landrace sativa with a distinctive sweet, piney aroma and a hint of anise; revered by hashmakers.

name: Acapulco Gold
summary: A classic Mexican landrace sativa with dense, orange-flecked nuggets and aromas of burnt toffee.

name: Maui Wowie
summary: A classic tropical sativa from Hawaii with sweet pineapple flavors.

name: Lamb's Bread
summary: A bright green, sticky Jamaican sativa, famously associated with Bob Marley.

name: OG Kush
summary: The genetic backbone of West Coast hybrids; an earthy-pine aroma with a citrus-fuel edge. Exact lineage is disputed.

name: Chemdog
summary: A mysterious, influential strain with a loud diesel aroma; parent to Sour Diesel and OG Kush. Lineage uncertain.

name: Sour Diesel
summary: A legendary sativa named for its pungent diesel aroma with a citrus edge; fast-acting and cerebral.

name: Headband
summary: A creamy, smooth cross of OG Kush and Sour Diesel with lemon and diesel notes.

name: Stardawg
summary: A Chemdog-heavy hybrid with a diesel funk and notes of pine and lemon under a blanket of trichomes.

name: GMO Cookies
summary: A pungent, savory cross of Chemdog and GSC, also called Garlic Cookies; stanky and strong.

name: Bruce Banner
summary: A potent hybrid with lightly sweet, earthy flavors and a diesel undertone.

name: White Fire OG
summary: Also called WiFi OG; a sour, earthy, diesel-scented hybrid with a heavy resin coat.

name: Triangle Kush
summary: A biting, gassy Florida cultivar likely descended from OG Kush, with soft vanilla notes.

name: SFV OG
aliases: sfv|sfv og kush|san fernando valley og
summary: A San Fernando Valley OG Kush phenotype with classic earthy-pine and citrus-fuel notes.

name: Fire OG
summary: One of the most potent OG cuts, with lemon, pine, and fuel notes and red-orange hairs.

name: Khalifa Kush
summary: An OG Kush cut bred for Wiz Khalifa, with sour lemon and pine notes.

name: GSC
summary: Girl Scout Cookies — a hugely influential dessert hybrid with sweet, minty, earthy notes and butter-sugar cookie character.

name: Animal Cookies
summary: A strong GSC descendant crossed with Fire OG; sweet-and-sour with purple-tinged buds.

name: Gelato
lineage: Sunset Sherbet x Thin Mint GSC
summary: Also called Larry Bird; a dessert hybrid with a sweet, creamy aroma and bright berry-citrus notes.

name: Gelato 41
lineage: Sunset Sherbet x Thin Mint GSC
summary: A sought-after Gelato phenotype with a sweet, creamy, gassy profile.

name: Wedding Cake
summary: A rich, tangy-sweet hybrid with a vanilla-cake aroma over an earthy base; Leafly Strain of the Year 2019.

name: Ice Cream Cake
summary: A creamy dessert indica with sweet vanilla wafting off frosty green-and-purple buds.

name: Kush Mints
summary: A minty, cookie-scented hybrid with icy-dark dense nugs.

name: Biscotti
summary: A cerebral Gelato descendant with a sweet cookie flavor and notes of diesel; purple-tinged buds.

name: Runtz
summary: A sweet, candy-like hybrid (Leafly Strain of the Year 2020) with a creamy taste and purple-to-green buds.

name: LA Kush Cake
summary: A smooth, indica-leaning hybrid with sweet vanilla and minty earth notes.

name: Lava Cake
lineage: Thin Mint GSC x Grape Pie
summary: A dessert hybrid with sweet chocolate, mint, and berry notes.

name: Key Lime Pie
summary: A tangier GSC phenotype tasting of fresh-squeezed lime with sweet undertones.

name: Tropicana Cookies
summary: A flavorful sativa-leaning cross of GSC and Tangie that smells like a glass of orange juice; deep-purple buds.

name: Vanilla Frosting
lineage: Humboldt Gelato x Humboldt Frost OG

name: MAC

name: Fruity Pebbles
lineage: Green Ribbon x Granddaddy Purple x Tahoe Alien
summary: Also FPOG; a sweet hybrid with a tropical berry flavor reminiscent of the cereal.

name: Granddaddy Purple

name: Purple Urkle

name: Grape Ape

name: Purple Punch
summary: A dessert indica with a sweet grape-and-berry aroma reminiscent of fruit candy.

name: Slurricane
summary: A purple, gassy indica with a grape-candy-gas smell and a thick trichome layer.

name: Cherry Pie
aliases: cherry kush|cherry pie kush|cherrie pie|cherry pye

name: Grape Pie

name: Forbidden Fruit

name: Zkittlez

name: Rainbow Belts

name: Mimosa

name: Blueberry

name: Blue Dream

name: Blueberry Muffins

name: Blackberry Kush

name: Haze

name: Skunk 1

name: Super Lemon Haze

name: Lemon Skunk

name: Jack Herer

name: Green Crack

name: Strawberry Cough

name: Tangie

name: Chocolope

name: Trainwreck

name: Pineapple Express

name: AK-47

name: Candyland

name: Banana Kush

name: Orange Creamsicle

name: Lemon Tree

name: Papaya Punch

name: Mango

name: Northern Lights

name: Bubba Kush

name: Mendo Breath

name: Gushers

name: Cheese

name: Island Sweet Skunk

name: ACDC

name: Charlotte's Web

name: Cannatonic

name: Harle-Tsu
